name: Spicy Country-Style Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Chicken Breasts, Skinned and Boneless
2 small Fresh Green or Red Chiles
1 large Red or Green Bell Pepper
2 tbsp Rice Wine or Dry Sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts into shreds, about 3 inches long.
2. Cut the fresh chiles in half and carefully remove the seeds. Shred the chiles.
3. Prepare all vegetables: shred the bamboo shoots, zucchini, and bell pepper after removing their seeds.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a wok or large skillet until almost smoking.
5. Quickly stir-fry the chicken shreds for 1 minute, or until slightly firm. Remove and drain the cooked chicken. Wipe the wok clean.
6. Reheat the remaining oil in the wok. Add shredded chiles, bamboo shoots, zucchini, and bell pepper. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes.
7. Add the rest of the ingredients (chicken stock, rice wine or sherry, chili bean sauce, sugar, soy sauce, vinegar, and tomato paste). Mix well and stir-fry for another minute.
8. Return the chicken shreds to the wok and give a few quick stirs to finish cooking. Serve immediately on a platter.
